complex-certificate.last_note: APPROVED solved: certificate 2sinA·G = αℓ_K+βℓ_L and every Fourier-table row reviewer-verified symbolically; non-collinearity proven; canonical proof copied to current.md.
complex-certificate.summary: Complex-number encoding of the hypotheses as real-vanishing polynomials; exhibit an explicit component-aware polynomial certificate for pow(B,ω)−pow(C,ω)=(c²−b²)/2.

family-invariance-boundary.summary: Show F(φ)=pow(B,ω)−pow(C,ω) is constant along the 1-parameter family (centre moves ⊥ BC) and evaluate at a closed-form boundary anchor.

midpoint-reflection-isogonal.last_note: Lemmas 1-4 (reflection dictionary + reduction to identity (I)) verified correct; synthetic derivation of (I) still open; superseded by two approved solved siblings.
midpoint-reflection-isogonal.summary: Reflect K in M, L in N to put K*, L* on isogonal rays through A (exact dictionary); prove the transferred power identity synthetically via a yet-unfound auxiliary circle/spiral map.

secant-trig-identity.last_note: APPROVED solved: KI identity, constraints (K)/(L), and full reduction chain all reviewer-verified symbolically + independent end-to-end configuration test; no gaps.
secant-trig-identity.summary: Reduce OM=ON to c·AP−b·AQ=(c²−b²)/2 via median formula + power of a point, then prove one trig identity modulo the verified E1–E6 system (identity confirmed branch-free at 1e-48).
